expression: /*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage == 'Japanese' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'BD T1', 'BD T2', 'BD T3', 'BD T4', 'BD T5', 'BD T6', 'BD T7', 'BD T8', 'Remux T1', 'Remux T2', 'Remux T3', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web T4', 'Web T5', 'Web T6')) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

/*Upscaled 4k*/ (queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 4k Bluray*/ (queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 1080P Bluray*/ (queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and count(rseMatched(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '1080p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0 ? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]
/*Ongoing Season‑Pack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

/*Top‑*3 Q/R Cached*/ (1*3) !=0 ? negate(  merge(    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'quality', (count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3? floor(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ),    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1440p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<2*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? floor(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ),    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '720p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), '480p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), streams), 'Unknown'), 'quality', 1*3)), negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams), uncached(streams)),streams)) : []

/*Top‑*3 Q/R Uncached*/ (1*3) !=0 ? negate(  merge(    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'quality', (count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3? floor(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ),    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '1440p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '1080p'), 'quality', ((count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '2160p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray', 'WEB-DL'))<=2*3 or count(quality(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), uncached(streams)), '1080p'), 'Bluray Remux', 'Bluray'))<=1*3) ? floor(1.5*3) : (1*3)) ),    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '720p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), '480p'), 'quality', 1*3),    perGroup(resolution(negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams)), 'Unknown'), 'quality', 1*3)), negate(seadex(streams), uncached(streams))) : []

/*Quality SELection*/ count(quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'live', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip')) > min(1.5*3, 10) ?   merge(quality(streams,'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR'), negate(merge( negate(releaseGroup(streams, '1', 'bit', '1080p'), releaseGroup(streams))), quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), 'WEBRip', 'Unknown'))) : count(quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'live', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV'))>min(1.5*3, 10) ?  merge(quality(streams, 'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'), negate(merge( negate(releaseGroup(streams, '1', 'bit', '1080p'), releaseGroup(streams))), quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), 'WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV', 'Unknown'))) :[]

/*Resolution SELection*/ count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >= min(4*3, 20)? merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown')) :  count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >= min(3*3, 15)?  merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 1*3)):  count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >= min(4*3, 20)?   merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 2*3)):  count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >= min(1*3, 5)?   merge(slice(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), 2*3), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 3*3)):  count(resolution( merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >= 0?   merge(slice(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), 3*3), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','live','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 4*3)):[]
